summary: AgriDocs Phase 2 testing complete. All 10 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Public /doc-upload/:token page works correctly: shows category context (Employer & Employee Compliance / SSS Contributions), year, coverage months, Take Photo + Browse Files buttons, file upload, auto-generated document names, qr-upload tag, and proper error handling for invalid/expired tokens (410).

issues: Error message shows 'Cannot connect to server' instead of the actual API error detail (e.g., 'Upload link has expired'). This is a minor UX issue - the page still shows the error state correctly, but the message could be more specific.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend documents.py: QR upload endpoints work correctly - POST /qr-upload-token requires auth, GET/POST /qr-upload/{token} are public
Backend: Token becomes expired after first upload (single-use) by setting token_expires_at to current time
Backend: Public upload correctly creates document with 'qr-upload' tag and 'Uploaded via phone (QR)' description
Backend: Document auto-naming works: 'SSS Contributions 2026 (January, February, March)'
Backend: Files uploaded to R2 with key format {org_id}/business_documents/{doc_id}/{file_id}.ext

Frontend DocUploadPage.js: All data-testid attributes present (doc-upload-page, doc-upload-loading, doc-upload-error, doc-upload-success, doc-upload-category, doc-upload-subcategory, camera-btn, gallery-btn, file-input, upload-submit-btn)
Frontend: Mobile-friendly design with proper viewport sizing
Frontend: Shows category context, year, coverage months from token
Frontend: Take Photo and Browse Files buttons both trigger file input
Frontend: File preview with remove button, size display
Frontend: Upload button appears after file selection
Frontend: Success page shows document name and close instruction
Frontend: Error page provides helpful guidance about generating new QR code
Frontend App.js: Route /doc-upload/:token correctly added as public route (no auth required)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test documents during backend and frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgriDocs Phase 2 fully tested. Public /doc-upload/:token page works for mobile file uploads. QR dialog on /documents generates correct token URLs. Token expiry (15 min) and single-use behavior working. Test documents were cleaned up.

tests: Creates document in DB with correct metadata
Files stored in R2 with valid r2_key

details: Shows coverage months: January, February, March
Shows 'Confirm this is the correct document type' warning
File preview with filename, size, remove button
Upload button appears after file selection
Shows 'You can close this tab' instruction
Error page shows for invalid token (404)
Error page shows for expired token (410)
Shows instruction to get new QR code
QR dialog opens from 'Upload via Phone' button
Coverage months selector appears for monthly types
Generate QR Code button creates QR image
Shows category/sub-category labels and 15-min expiry notice
